name: Middlebury Parks and Recreation
description: Middlebury Parks and Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Middlebury, VT. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Middlebury Recreation Department
description: Middlebury Recreation Department is a place to play pickleball in Middlebury, VT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Teen Center
description: The Teen Center is a place to play pickleball in Middlebury, VT. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Vergennes Union Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Vergennes Union Elementary School in Vergennes, VT! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
